parameters.content:
## Sticky Notes — Upsert

**POST** `/webhook/sticky-notes/upsert`

Crea o actualiza una nota adhesiva.

**Lógica:**
- Sin `id` → INSERT
- Con `id` → UPDATE

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid (opcional)",
  "text": "contenido",
  "color": "yellow",
  "created_by": "uuid (requerido en create)",
  "actions": ["CALENDAR"],
  "redirects": ["/appointments?act=Crear"]
}
```

**Response 200:** nota completa con todos los campos.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sticky_notes (text, color, created_by, status, actions, redirects) VALUES ('{{ $json.text }}', '{{ $json.color }}', '{{ $json.created_by }}'::uuid, 'active', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.actions) }}'::jsonb, '{{ JSON.stringify($json.redirects) }}'::jsonb) RETURNING id, text, color, created_by, created_at, updated_at, status, COALESCE(actions, '[]'::jsonb) AS actions, COALESCE(redirects, '[]'::jsonb) AS redirects

UPDATE sticky_notes SET text = '{{ $json.text }}', color = '{{ $json.color }}', updated_at = NOW(), actions = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.actions) }}'::jsonb, redirects = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.redirects) }}'::jsonb WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid RETURNING id, text, color, created_by, created_at, updated_at, status, COALESCE(actions, '[]'::jsonb) AS actions, COALESCE(redirects, '[]'::jsonb) AS redirects
